initiatives.name:
SURJ Biddeford-Saco
              Area
initiatives.description: A chapter of the national SURJ network organizing white people for racial justice through mutual aid and community solidarity in the Biddeford-Saco area. They coordinate education initiatives, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through political education and accountable organizing.

initiatives.name: Biddeford Community Gardens
initiatives.description: Our vision is for our gardens to provide food security for all Biddeford residents – to feed our city from the ground up

initiatives.name: Twin Cities Tenants Alliance
initiatives.description: A tenants' alliance leveraging the united power of renters and their allies in Biddeford & Saco Maine.

initiatives.name: Better Biddeford
initiatives.description: Better Biddeford is a community engagement initiative working to connect people, pollinate ideas, & foster more equitable, healthy communities for ALL
